messages.text: crazy talking while double fisting tablets and caffeine
i saw that straw and my gpa dropped two points
blame the cookie too, he ruined nations today
no that cookie looked like my last shred of discipline
u zoomed in on it didnt u
so its me or its me?
they did, bones looking more put together than me
crazy part is the latte has more structure too
at least the latte is stable and shows up
unlike u skipping chapters and common sense
id attend every lecture if you were the slide

let me take you out this week
